3.2.3. Morphology and transmission electron microscopy (TEM)
The  morphometric  characteristics  of  the  improved  formulation  of
AMP-BLF-loaded-NPs  were  determined  using  TEM  imaging  and  the
pictures are shown in Fig. 5. Images revealed NPs with fairly spherical
shapes  and  average  particle  sizes  similar  to  those  reported  in  PCS
morphometry studies.
